notable_excerpts: We will have employees, we will grow our resources, but it will be more and more in the front end.
I would like to express my gratitude to all our employees for their hard work and performance in a very challenging environment.
We are seeing some amount of healthy demand from the rural side.
Earlier today, the Board also announced an interim dividend of INR 5 per share, and they also recommended to shareholders the first ever bonus share issue in the ratio of 1:1.
Gratitude to our shareholders who have supported us in all our times, and to the Board for their leadership support and their strategic guidance.
